html:
Exclusive to:

The Think Tank is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Prototypers & Stations Filter and Structures Filter, requires four Boards to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

When standing close to a Think Tank, players are able to access the Seafaring Filter and prototype its recipes.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Seaside Collection
Lighthouse Think Tank
A beacon of nautical knowledge.

Tips

  • The Think Tank makes a loud noise when a player is nearby, and as such it is advised to not have it in the main area of your base.

Trivia

  • The Think Tank was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Maxwell's quote seems to suggest that Wilson is the one who invented the Think Tank.
  • WX-78's quote is a pun based on the C# programing language.
  • On release, the Think Tank was able to open gifts like the Science Machine and Alchemy Engine.

Gallery

  • A burnt Think Tank.
  • A Think Tank in-game with the Alchemy Engine and Shadow Manipulator for scale
  • Unused gift opening animation
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
Think Tank
"Science at sea."
Object Info
Perk
Grants access to the Seafaring Filter.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"seafaring_prototyper"
“I think tanks are in order.”
–Wilson
“Watery nerd stuff.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang need help thinking on scary water.”
–Wolfgang
“Thinking on the waves makes me nauseous.”
–Wendy
“IT RUNS ON SEA SHARP”
–WX-78
“It's good to keep the mind occupied at sea.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's good to be ready for anything at sea.”
–Woodie
“Now to see if Higgsbury's ideas hold water.”
–Maxwell
“A seafaring Viking is keen öf mind and sharp öf wit.”
–Wigfrid
“There's all kinds of fun things you can do at sea.”
–Webber
“All the knowledge of a seasoned seafarer!”
–Warly
“Can build Floaty stuff”
–Wormwood
“Always be inventing.”
–Winona
“For a mind as vast as the sea is deep!”
–Wortox
“Make things for water, florp!”
–Wurt
“We're going to need a better boat.”
–Walter
“The ocean is so much more finicky to navigate than the time stream.”
–Wanda
The Think Tank is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Prototypers & Stations Filter and Structures Filter, requires four Boards to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
When standing close to a Think Tank, players are able to access the Seafaring Filter and prototype its recipes.

The Think Tank makes a loud noise when a player is nearby, and as such it is advised to not have it in the main area of your base.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Think Tank was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
Maxwell's quote seems to suggest that Wilson is the one who invented the Think Tank.
WX-78's quote is a pun based on the C# programing language.
On release, the Think Tank was able to open gifts like the Science Machine and Alchemy Engine.

It is found in the [[Prototypers & Stations Filter]] and [[Structures Filter]], requires four [[Boards]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. When standing close to a Think Tank, players are able to access the [[Seafaring Filter]] and prototype its recipes. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}}
{{SkinInfo |image = Lighthouse Think Tank Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Seaside Collection |name = Lighthouse Think Tank |description = A beacon of nautical knowledge. }}
== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * The Think Tank makes a loud noise when a player is nearby, and as such it is advised to not have it in the main area of your base. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Think Tank was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update. * Maxwell's quote seems to suggest that Wilson is the one who invented the Think Tank. *WX-78's quote is a pun based on the [[wikipedia:C_Sharp_(programming_language)|C#]] programing language. * On release, the Think Tank was able to open gifts like the Science Machine and [[Alchemy Engine/DST|Alchemy Engine]]. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Think Tank Burnt.png|A burnt Think Tank.
